titles.title: My Life Is in You, Lord

authors.author: Daniel Gardner
Daniel Gardner
In dir ist mein Leben (in dir meine Stärke)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My life is in You, Lord, My strength is in You, Lord, My hope is in You, Lord, In You, it's in You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will praise You with all of my life, I will praise You with all of my strength, With all of my life, With all of my strength, All of my hope is in You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, The Spirit of the Lord is my victory, The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, Great and mighty in me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Greater is He that is in me than he that is in the world; I am more than a conqueror By the power of His word.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus, I can do anything; By the power of Your Spirit, You're the One who strengthens me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, The Spirit of the Lord is my victory, The Spirit of the Lord is great and mighty, Great and mighty in me.
